title: Saddle Crafting Recipie
description: Simple mod that makes saddles craftable!
body:
## Craftable Saddles Datapack and mod

This Minecraft datapack and mod makes Saddles craftable, allowing you to easily obtain them without needing to find a village!

**Crafting Recipe:**

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/906b2ec06caafd877c21b186b1b25c247a140ebc.png)

**How to Install:**

Datapack Instructions:
1.  Download the datapack.
2.  Place the `.zip` file into the `datapacks` folder of your Minecraft world.
3.  Use `/reload` in-game or restart your world to enable the datapack.

Mod Instructions:
1.  Download the mod.
2.  Place the `.jar` file into the `mods` folder of your Minecraft installation.
3.  ]restart your game to enable the mod.

Enjoy more bells in your Minecraft world!
